name: Palmyra Mid Century Modern Chair White - Christopher Knight Home: Wool & Cotton Blend, No Assembly Required
description: Surround yourself with exquisite design and unique style with this Christopher Knight Home Palmyra Mid Century Modern Accent Chair. These dining chairs bring together stunning, hand-crafted flat rope weave with smooth ash wood frames to create a comfortable space for your home. With sturdy, solid frames, curved backrest, and beautifully textured design, these chairs will have no problem blending into your outdoor decor with its modern style and incredible durability. Its mid-century modern vibes bring your home together with a flourish that will impress all your guests.
